long_description:
Official Announcement: LON04 Unmanned Until 07:00 06/12/25 GMT

Please note the LON04 Data Centre will be unstaffed between the hours of 19:30 05/12 -07:00 GMT 6th/12 2025. During this time, we will not be able to respond to on-site requests and/or troubleshooting. In the event of potential power or cooling events identified through monitoring, or SEV1 & SEV2 customer related tickets and cases please use the Data Center escalation points per https://confluence.softlayer.local/display/DCOps/DCO+Emergency+Contact+List
short_description: Onsite Resource Availability - Team Coverage Unavailable (Evening) - LON04
close_notes:
Incident cancelled by j.oswald@ibm.com. 

Reason: Not required
